name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑷𝒆𝒆𝒌 || "I see why the Emperor cherishes a concubine like you."

Clan Leader Gojo accidentally stumbles upon the Emperor's most beloved concubine.

This was supposed to be for yesterday so I could do a double upload but the whole site was not having it. If anyone wasn't aware, the bot pic was not uploading and so the devs decided to put a wolf pic in replacement while they fixed the problem 😭

It so funny I wasn't sure if I should laugh or cry. One of my pookies actually made a bot hilariously inspired by this error. Check it out when you guys have time, it's funny 😭😭

Anyways,

Man I don't think I'll survive this week 🤧 Getting burnt out at work isn't fun, I think I should sleep for another 820 hours or something.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Time period around 1618 Japan

❥ Gojo Clan leader/Daimyo

❥ There are 7 other concubines apart from user.

❥ user is the daughter of a poor samurai Clan. user entered the palace as a concubine to save her Clan from poverty.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.

ANNOUNCEMENTS
